goal: Close all v3 loose ends, exhaust low-friction signal space, attempt targeted weak-window repair, and conditionally evaluate medium-friction branches.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable and must never be modified.
Previously rejected branches (H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon) must NOT be reopened.
Static high-IV regime is a volatility regime, not a directional signal — do not reuse as direction.
Medium-friction wave is locked until low-friction wave, weak-window repair, and all prior stages have terminal decisions.
Maximum 2 weak pockets may be selected for specialist repair.
Every branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted, rejected, or formally skipped) before proceeding.
Do not confuse data tasks with research results.

stages.title: Полный closure-audit по прошлым планам
stages.objective: Create a unified registry of all unresolved items from previous plan iterations and establish the v4 research project foundation.
actions: Open a new research_project for v4.
Record a closure-audit documenting all incomplete items from v1–v3.
Record the immutable reference (active-signal-v1@1) in project memory.
Define research_map axes for v4.
Compile a single open-items register covering all outstanding debts.
success_criteria: Research project, atlas, and closure-audit are all created.

stages.title: Формально закрыть все незавершенные документы и memory-nodes прошлых планов
stages.objective: Eliminate all organizational debt from prior plans by creating terminal nodes for every unfinished branch.
actions: Create a terminal result node for A1_high_iv_long_v1 from v3.
Verify and confirm rejected status for A1b_high_iv_momentum and A4_wed_afternoon.
Verify and confirm rejected status for H1_post_funding_long and H2_expiry_lead_lag.
Create a v3_final_report research_record summarizing all outcomes.
Update all registry statuses to reflect terminal decisions.
Confirm no branch exists without a terminal node.
success_criteria: No research memory branch remains without a terminal status.
All v1–v3 branches have explicit terminal nodes (promoted, rejected, or skipped).

stages.title: Полностью закрыть ветку A2_iv_acceleration
stages.objective: Drive the A2 IV-acceleration branch to a definitive terminal decision through a full feature-contract → materialization → plausibility → prototype → acceptance chain.
actions: Define feature contract for cf_iv_delta_1h custom feature.
Materialize the custom feature and verify data readiness.
Run plausibility check on base-absent surface.
Build strict standalone prototypes (a2_v2, a2_v3).
Run stability analysis on all prototypes.
Run integration test against active-signal-v1.
Record terminal decision (promoted or rejected).
success_criteria: Both standalone and integration results are recorded.

stages.title: Только если A2 не promoted — полностью закрыть A3_broader_cl_transition
stages.objective: If A2 was not promoted, drive the A3 broader CL-transition branch to a terminal decision so no branch remains half-alive.
actions: Define transition feature contract for A3 candidate.
Group transitions by semantic meaning.
Run plausibility check on base-absent surface.
Build strict standalone prototypes.
Run full acceptance chain (standalone, stability, integration).
Record terminal decision (promoted or rejected).
stages.gate_hint: Only executes if A2_iv_acceleration was NOT promoted. If A2 is promoted, skip this stage entirely.

stages.title: Общий вердикт по low-friction wave
stages.objective: Produce a final binding verdict on whether low-friction signal space is exhausted or contains viable candidates.
actions: Compare all low-friction candidates (A2, A3 if run) against the immutable base.
Classify each candidate as mainline quality, specialist watchlist, or rejected.
Adopt one of three outcomes: (a) promoted candidate, (b) specialist watchlist, or (c) low-friction space exhausted.
Record the final verdict in research memory.
success_criteria: A single binding final verdict on low-friction wave exists.
Every candidate has an explicit classification.

stages.title: Новая программа v4 — weak-window repair specialists
stages.objective: Identify the weakest performance windows of the immutable base and build targeted specialist hypotheses to repair them.
actions: Build a weakness atlas for the immutable base using diagnostic analysis.
Select at most 2 weak pockets from the atlas.
For each weak pocket, formulate one specialist hypothesis.
For each specialist, run a shortened but honest acceptance chain (feature contract, prototype, plausibility, standalone, integration).
Record verdict for each specialist hypothesis.
success_criteria: There is a clear answer on whether targeted repair can produce something useful.
Each specialist hypothesis has a recorded verdict.

stages.title: Только после этого — решение по medium-friction wave
stages.objective: Conditionally evaluate whether medium-friction branches (B1: cross-symbol leadership, B2: model-backed IV routing) should be unlocked.
actions: Verify all 5 unlock conditions are met: (1) A2 terminal, (2) A3 terminal or skipped, (3) low-friction verdict recorded, (4) weak-window repair completed, (5) no promoted candidate.
If unlock granted, evaluate B1 cross-symbol leadership branch.
If unlock granted, evaluate B2 model-backed IV-routing / compression branch.
Record lock/unlock decision and rationale.
success_criteria: A clear lock or unlock decision is recorded.
If unlocked, initial scoping of B1 and B2 is complete.
stages.gate_hint: All 5 conditions must be simultaneously true: (1) A2 has terminal decision, (2) A3 has terminal decision or is formally skipped, (3) low-friction final verdict is recorded, (4) weak-window repair program is completed, (5) no candidate was promoted. If any condition fails, this stage is locked.

stages.title: Финальный отчет по v4
stages.objective: Produce a comprehensive final report summarizing all v4 research outcomes, decisions, and recommendations.
actions: Compile all stage results into a unified v4 final report.
Record the report as a research_memory entry.
Document terminal decisions for every investigated branch.
State recommendations for any future research directions.
Send notification of plan completion.
success_criteria: A complete v4 final report exists covering all stages.
All branches have documented terminal outcomes.

warnings: Stage 3 (A2_iv_acceleration) sub-steps are detailed in section titles only; actions were inferred from section headings.
Stage 4 (A3_broader_cl_transition) is gated on A2 not being promoted.
Stage 7 (medium-friction wave) has an explicit 5-condition unlock gate.
Stage 8 has no explicit objective or success criteria in source; inferred from context.
